triggers.name: Alarm State Change
triggers.description: Triggers when a CloudWatch alarm changes state (OK, ALARM, INSUFFICIENT_DATA).

triggers.name: New Log Event
triggers.description: Triggers when a new log event is received in a specified log group.

triggers.name: Issue Created
triggers.description: Triggers when a new Jira issue is created.

triggers.name: Issue Updated
triggers.description: Triggers when a Jira issue is updated.

triggers.name: Build Completed
triggers.description: Triggers when a Jenkins build completes (success, unstable, or failure).

triggers.name: Job Failed
triggers.description: Triggers when a Jenkins job fails.

triggers.name: Monitor Alert Triggered
triggers.description: Triggers when a Datadog monitor alert is triggered.

triggers.name: New Event
triggers.description: Triggers when a new event is posted to Datadog's event stream.

triggers.name: Incident Triggered
triggers.description: Triggers when a new incident is created in PagerDuty.

triggers.name: Incident Resolved
triggers.description: Triggers when an incident is resolved.

triggers.name: Ticket Created
triggers.description: Triggers when a new ServiceNow incident ticket is created.

triggers.name: Ticket Updated
triggers.description: Triggers when an incident ticket is updated.

triggers.name: Pod Failed
triggers.description: Triggers when a Kubernetes Pod enters a Failed state.

triggers.name: Deployment Scaled
triggers.description: Triggers when a Deployment’s replica count changes.

triggers.name: Instance State Change
triggers.description: Triggers when an EC2 instance changes state (pending, running, stopped, terminated).

triggers.name: New Instance Launched
triggers.description: Triggers when a new EC2 instance is launched.

triggers.name: Pipeline Succeeded
triggers.description: Triggers when a GitLab pipeline finishes successfully.

triggers.name: Merge Request Opened
triggers.description: Triggers when a new merge request is opened.

triggers.name: Work Item Created
triggers.description: Triggers when a new work item is created in Azure DevOps.

triggers.name: Build Completed
triggers.description: Triggers when a pipeline build completes.
